_comment: OMNI-AGENT v2 governed Tool Shed. 32 sibling-app tools — each documents codename / port / dataset / hero pattern / brand_color / icon / kamiwaza_feature / multimodal capability. The Streamlit sidebar renders this as the live Tool Shed view; the agent loop uses TOOL_SCHEMAS in src/tools.py to bind these to OpenAI tool-calling.

tools.name: query_marlin
tools.dataset: AIS maritime traffic + IMB pirate attack reports
tools.summary: Classify a CONUS->INDOPACOM sealift lane against piracy + chokepoint risk.

tools.name: query_forge
tools.dataset: MIMII vibration spectrograms + USMC depot maintenance ledger
tools.summary: Score machine vibration spectrograms; classify failure mode + remaining useful life.

tools.name: query_optik
tools.dataset: TM-style technical manuals + UAV imagery
tools.summary: Vision-RAG: photo + free-text query against Marine technical manual corpus.

tools.name: query_riptide
tools.dataset: FEMA NFIP flood claims + USGS gauges
tools.summary: Score flood risk for an installation/AOI; cite top historical claim drivers.

tools.name: query_meridian
tools.dataset: NOAA + JTWC + FEMA + GCSS-MC across MARFORPAC nodes
tools.use_case: Climate-resilience watch over MARFORPAC supply lines
tools.summary: Score sustainment nodes (Guam, Okinawa, CNMI, PHL) and write the 5-paragraph node-risk brief.

tools.name: query_corsair
tools.dataset: AIS MARSEC patrol track history + pattern-of-life
tools.summary: Forecast next-period MARSEC patrol gaps; flag anomalous vessel tracks.

tools.name: query_strider
tools.dataset: Convoy GPS traces + IED hotspots
tools.summary: Score a planned convoy route; recommend alternates with risk + ETA tradeoff.

tools.name: query_raptor
tools.dataset: MQ-9 ISR imagery + INTREP corpus
tools.summary: Detect objects in ISR imagery and compose the INTREP from the detections.

tools.name: query_vanguard
tools.dataset: GCSS-MC PCS cargo manifests + DTS records
tools.summary: Track a Marine's PCS HHG move; pre-file damage claim if shipment exceptions detected.

tools.name: query_sentinel
tools.dataset: Perimeter camera frames + intrusion detections
tools.summary: Vision-classify a perimeter camera frame; flag intrusion + recommend response.

tools.name: query_anchor
tools.dataset: Synthetic SOP + MARADMIN corpus
tools.summary: RAG against the MARADMIN/SOP corpus; cite paragraph + URL for any answer.

tools.name: query_weathervane
tools.dataset: NOAA NDFD + JTWC + tropical-cyclone forecasts
tools.use_case: Mission weather windowing for INDOPACOM ops
tools.summary: Slice weather data for an AOI and recommend go/no-go window for the next N hours.

tools.name: query_wildfire
tools.dataset: NIFC perimeters + CalFire RAWS + Marine installation footprints
tools.use_case: Wildfire risk + comms cutover for installations
tools.summary: Forecast wildfire risk near a Marine installation; recommend comms PACE cutover.

tools.name: query_ember
tools.dataset: NASA FIRMS active-fire detections + Marine training ranges
tools.summary: Cluster FIRMS hotspots near training ranges; assess immediate risk.

tools.name: query_vitals
tools.dataset: DHA Medical Supply Inventory + Medical Supply Network Data Model
tools.summary: Score blood-supply spokes (cold-chain risk, demand pressure) and write the MEDLOG commander brief.

tools.name: query_watchtower
tools.dataset: HIFLD + NASA Earthdata + GCSS-MC
tools.use_case: I-COP Aggregator — Installation Common Operating Picture
tools.summary: Aggregate HIFLD + Earthdata + GCSS into one installation COP; flag correlated anomalies.

tools.name: query_pallet_vision
tools.dataset: Drone Dataset (UAV) + construction-site object frames
tools.use_case: AI Visual Quantification Engine — image -> pallet/truck count
tools.summary: Vision-count pallets/trucks/containers in an aerial or warehouse photo.

tools.name: query_trace
tools.dataset: California logistics + GCSS-MC consumption ledger
tools.use_case: LogTRACE — Class I-IX consumption rate estimator
tools.summary: Estimate Class I-IX consumption for a MAGTF scenario (size, optempo, environment).

tools.name: query_reorder
tools.dataset: NASA Pred-Mx + GCSS-MC Class IX history
tools.use_case: Parts demand forecasting (Class IX) for deployed MAGTF
tools.summary: Forecast 30/60/90-day Class IX shortfalls for a forward node and rank reorder priorities.

tools.name: query_queue
tools.dataset: GCSS-MC depot maintenance throughput + Predictive Mx
tools.summary: Re-sequence the depot maintenance queue to maximize ready-line throughput.

tools.name: query_ghost
tools.dataset: IEEE WiFi + Bluetooth RF fingerprints
tools.summary: Cluster RF fingerprints into pattern-of-life signatures; flag anomalous emitters.

tools.name: query_stockroom
tools.dataset: Inventory Control Management (Excel)
tools.summary: Audit unit inventory against on-hand vs authorized; flag reorder + cycle-count items.

tools.name: query_chain
tools.dataset: Global Supply Chain Disruption + Risk + Logistics
tools.summary: Forecast cascading supply-chain disruptions across NSN + supplier graph.

tools.name: query_opengate
tools.dataset: data.gov catalog
tools.summary: RAG over the data.gov catalog; surface the right open dataset for a planner question.

tools.name: query_embodied
tools.dataset: Xperience-10M egocentric clips
tools.summary: Coach a Marine through an egocentric training scene; score safety + tactic.

tools.name: query_redline
tools.dataset: Synthetic CUI document corpus
tools.summary: Auto-tag CUI/FOUO/SECRET portions of a document; recommend handling caveat.

tools.name: query_dispatch
tools.dataset: Synthetic 911 audio + dispatcher map
tools.summary: Triage a 911 call (or text intake); dispatch nearest unit + recommend response posture.

tools.name: query_learn
tools.dataset: Synthetic Moodle export (Marine learners, posts, submissions)
tools.summary: Score a Marine-learner cohort across competencies and write the instructor brief.

tools.name: query_cuas_detect
tools.dataset: RF spectrum signatures (synthetic IQ traces / spectrogram)
tools.summary: Classify a captured RF spectrogram as drone class/threat and recommend engagement.

tools.name: query_spectra
tools.dataset: Synthetic I/Q traces + EW emitter signatures
tools.summary: Classify an I/Q trace into an emitter family; recommend counter-EW posture.

tools.name: query_cadence
tools.dataset: Synthetic course rubrics + Marine submissions (DOCX/XLSX)
tools.summary: Analyze a Marine's submission against rubric + doctrine and write the assessment letter.

tools.name: query_omni
tools.dataset: Multi-stream installation feeds (gate, badge, BMS, weather, RF) — synthetic ICOP
tools.summary: Fuse ICOP streams for an installation and correlate anomalies for the requesting persona.

tools.name: query_contested_log
tools.dataset: BTS edges + IMB pirate attacks + GCSS lots + AIS lanes + global SC disruptions
tools.summary: Plan a contested CONUS-to-EABO sustainment movement (rail / sealift / last-mile) with risk overlays.

tools.name: query_predict_maint
tools.dataset: GCSS-MC fleet telemetry + maintenance work orders
tools.summary: Forecast remaining useful life on a fleet vehicle; rank PM candidates.

tools.name: query_storm_shift
tools.dataset: NOAA storm projections + installation footprints
tools.summary: Plan storm-shift evac + sheltering for an installation in the storm cone.

tools.name: query_drone_dominance
tools.dataset: ATAK drone telemetry + EW return contact
tools.summary: Score air-dominance posture against incoming drone swarm; recommend allocations.

tools.name: query_omni_intel
tools.dataset: All-source INT cluster observations (HUMINT/SIGINT/IMINT/OSINT)
tools.summary: Correlate all-source observation clusters and compose the daily All-Source Intel Brief.

tools.name: query_marine_medic
tools.dataset: TCCC casualty packets (synthetic) + treatment ladders
tools.use_case: Marine Medic — TCCC triage + casualty card synthesis
tools.summary: Triage a TCCC casualty packet (text or photo of injury) and recommend treatment + 9-line.

tools.name: query_guardrail
tools.dataset: Synthetic CUI corpus + ABAC policy
tools.summary: ABAC-check a document/intercept against persona; redact or release with audit trail.

tools.name: query_travelog
tools.dataset: Synthetic DTS travel records
tools.summary: Plan a PCS travel itinerary; pre-validate voucher line items against JTR.

tools.name: query_schoolhouse
tools.dataset: Visual ID library + scene library + persona reactions + competency timeseries
tools.summary: Roll up training competencies for a Marine cohort across the schoolhouse.

tools.name: query_mesh_infer
tools.dataset: Inference Mesh node catalog + sensitivity taxonomy
tools.summary: Route an inference task across the Kamiwaza Inference Mesh by data sensitivity (UNCLAS / CUI / SECRET / TS).

tools.name: query_fed_rag
tools.dataset: Federated silo corpora (Albany / Pendleton / Philly / Tobyhanna)
tools.use_case: Federated RAG across enclaves — no data movement
tools.summary: Federated RAG: query simultaneously across multiple silos without moving data.

tools.name: query_chain_of_command
tools.dataset: Synthetic ORBAT + personnel + relationship-typed clearances
tools.summary: ReBAC: walk the relationship graph to decide if a Marine can access a document.

tools.name: query_cat_router
tools.dataset: Kamiwaza model catalog (synthetic 8-model garden)
tools.use_case: Model-Catalog Routing — pick the right model for the task
tools.summary: Route a workflow's tasks across the Kamiwaza model garden under a chosen mode (best-quality / fast-cheap).

tools.name: query_dde_rag
tools.dataset: Distributed corpora across edge / region / HQ nodes (synthetic 50 GB GCSS-MC)
tools.use_case: Kamiwaza Distributed Data Engine — compute at data
tools.summary: Compute-at-data: send the query to where the GBs live, return only the cited paragraphs.
